style_prefix: Cinematic high-quality realistic K-drama style, shallow depth of field, detailed textures, 8k resolution, emotional lighting

chairman.default: Korean man, age 73, receding salt-and-pepper hair, deep wrinkles around eyes and mouth, sharp but sorrowful eyes, wearing a charcoal wool three-piece suit, standing 175cm, dignified posture but slightly stooped
chairman.crisis: Korean man, age 73, receding salt-and-pepper hair, sweat and soot on face, charcoal wool suit jacket removed, white dress shirt sleeves rolled up, determined and desperate expression

young_man.default: Korean man, age 25, clean-cut short black hair, kind and earnest eyes, slightly tanned skin, wearing a worn-out light blue denim shirt over a white t-shirt, athletic but lean build

son.default: Korean boy, age 10, bowl-cut black hair, bright smiling eyes, wearing a 90s style yellow striped polo shirt

images.prompt_en: Standing alone in a dark, luxurious study filled with books. He is staring at a large, ornate wooden grandfather clock that has stopped. Moody moonlight through the window. Cinematic side lighting.
images.video_prompt: A continuous slow zoom towards the chairman's grieving face as the moonlight subtly shifts casting shadows.

images.prompt_en: Inside a humble, cluttered clock repair workshop. The young man is holding a small tool, looking at the older man with respect. Dust motes dancing in the sunlight through a small window.
images.video_prompt: The young man stops his work and looks up at the chairman with a respectful, warm smile as dust motes drift in the cinematic sunlight.

images.prompt_en: Extreme close-up of the young man's wrist. He is wearing a distinctive vintage silver wristwatch with a leather strap. The older man's hand is trembling nearby, reaching out but not touching. Shallow depth of field.
images.video_prompt: The camera pans slowly across the vintage watch face as the light reflects off the silver case, the chairman's hand trembling slightly in the foreground.

images.prompt_en: Flashback to 30 years ago. A sunny park. The young boy is holding the same silver wristwatch, showing it to someone off-camera with a big smile. Warm, nostalgic golden hour lighting. Film grain effect.
images.video_prompt: The boy laughs and turns the watch to show the camera, bright sun flares across the screen in a nostalgic handheld film style.

images.prompt_en: A smoke-filled room with orange fire glowing in the background. The older man is rushing forward, shielding his face with one arm, reaching for an old wooden box on a burning shelf. Intense action composition.
images.video_prompt: Intense flickering flames in the background as the chairman moves through billows of smoke, his eyes focused and determined as he reaches for the box.

images.prompt_en: Back in the study. The grandfather clock's pendulum is finally swinging. The two men are standing side-by-side, looking at the clock. The older man has a single tear on his cheek, a faint smile. Peaceful morning light.
images.video_prompt: The clock pendulum begins to swing rhythmically. A single tear rolls down the chairman's cheek as he looks at the young man, both sharing a moment of silent understanding.
